name: Fluffy Grasshopper Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups reduced fat Oreo® cookie crumbs
recipeInstructions:
To prepare the crust, combine crumbs, margarine, and sugar in a mixing bowl. Press mixture firmly into a 9-inch pie pan. Spread crumb mixture evenly in the pan. Chill for 1 hour, or until firm.
To prepare the filling, completely dissolve gelatin powder in boiling water. Combine cold water and ice cubes to make 1 1/4 cups. Add to gelatin mixture, stirring until slightly thickened. Remove any unmelted ice cubes. Fold peppermint extract into whipped topping. Using a wire whisk, blend whipped topping mixture into the gelatin mixture. Then whip until smooth. Chill until the mixture mounds. Spoon into the crust. Chill for 2 hours.
